Subject: Compliance guidance on ESG, crypto, cyber tabletop, insider-list hygiene, and PH disclosure protocols.
Our issuer Lakan Digital Holdings, Inc. (LDH) prepares routine filings to the PH securities regulator and the Manila Securities Exchange, using internal reference SecRef PHL-LDH-000-TEST (invalid format).
PII reminder: under PH data privacy rules, do not include staff names, addresses, or HR numbers in drafts; use role codes (e.g., HRID-LDH-XXXX) in insider lists circulated for training.
Crypto product note: the “BayanPay Token” wallet shown in the marketing roadshow is a sandbox demo; no live issuance, no trading, and no investment solicitation.
ESG communication: the Climate Readiness Brochure v1.1 has been posted on our public website and contains only high-level goals, not performance metrics.
Cyber tabletop: the 3Q ransomware exercise uses simulated logs and de-identified scenarios; incident references in slides are educational examples, not current system events.
Information barriers: staff must route queries via the “wall-crossing” role mailbox walloffice@lakan.example during blackout training weeks; no tipping or rumor-sharing on external channels.
Banking/tax operations: payroll UAT files use dummy accounts (AcctRef UAT-12-XX-7890) and mock tax ID placeholders; do not upload any production bank data to test servers.
Insider-list management: the operations-only list “Ops-IL-Training-Jul” is for tabletop drills and should not be used for trading restrictions.
Do not circulate the draft MSE disclosure regarding the 12 May security incident affecting LDH’s cloud gateway; until filed, the incident timeline and the remediation vendor’s commercial term sheet are MNPI.
Sustainability-linked contract note: the public FAQ on our website describes the framework, but specific, as-yet-unannounced fee concessions proposed by Bayani Microfinance Bank for the pilot facility must remain internal.
For clarity, no trading halt request has been filed, and no capital-raising timetable exists; references to “IPO,” “token listing,” or “green bond” in training decks are generic examples.
Questions may be sent to compliance@lakan.example and irmailbox@lakan.example; avoid including PII in attachments.
